title: helichrysum oblongifolium
intro: Helichrysum oblongifolium, also known as the Everlasting, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in reducing pain, inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The health benefits of Helichrysum oblongifolium include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve skin conditions, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, Helichrysum oblongifolium is often used to make teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
